notes: South Africa were without suspended midfield pair Teboho Mokoena and Themba Zwane, with Sithole returning to the XI to partner Mbatha; South Korea made a shock rotation call dropping captain Son Heung-min entirely, replacing him with Oh Hyeon-gyu as the starting spearhead.
home_scorers: Thapelo Maseko (set-piece / box-to-box threat, actual scorer 63')
Oswin Appollis (direct winger, leading assist-maker in qualifying)
away_scorers: Oh Hyeon-gyu (starting striker, replaced Son, scored vs Czechia)
